title: Industry Sector Details

fields.label: Icon
fields.name: icon
fields.instructions: Font Awesome 5 Solid icon. IMPORTANT: this site's Elementor bundle is Font Awesome 5.15.3, not 6 — icon names that only exist in FA6 (e.g. fa-droplet, fa-magnifying-glass, fa-chart-simple) render blank. Verify any new icon by testing getComputedStyle(el, '::before').content on a live element before assuming a name is valid — do not guess from memory or current FA docs (this mistake was made twice already in WP-04 and while auditing this page).

fields.label: Summary
fields.name: summary
fields.instructions: Short card-length description. Migrate verbatim from the live, already-approved Industries page (971) card copy — see IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md's migration table.

fields.label: Overview
fields.name: overview
fields.instructions: Longer detail-page narrative. Left blank at initial migration — no richer per-sector content exists in any reviewed source beyond the card-length Summary (checked: content briefing doc, brochure, live page). Do not fill with generic/templated filler; leave blank until real sector-specific copy is provided. See DECISIONS.md.

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order in [iep_industry_grid]. Migrate using each sector's current position on the live Industries page (1–8, see migration table).

description: CMS-007 deployment package — field model for a brand-new cspt-industry-sector CPT (no pre-existing Greenly demo CPT covers Industries, confirmed by testing /industry/, /sector/, /sectors/ — all 404). Relationship fields to Services/Case Studies deliberately NOT included here — that cross-linking is WP-08's explicit scope per WCP-001-Progress-Register.md, once WP-04/05/06/07 content all exists to relate.
